LanguageData.FCP_Faction_Enclave.description: Ruthless remnants of the alt world government, the Enclave believe themselves to be humanity’s rightful rulers. Isolated, technologically advanced, and fiercely nationalistic, they seek to restore civilization under their iron-fisted vision—no matter the cost to outsiders.
LanguageData.FCP_Faction_Enclave.ideoDescription: The Enclave represents the continuation of the United States government, destined to reclaim and restore America. Only pure, untainted humans have the right to rebuild civilization. All others are aberrations to be removed or subjugated.
LanguageData.FCP_Faction_Enclave.label: The Enclave
